title: Abhimanyu Ki Alien Family
subTitle: Four aliens, disguised as humans, navigate life on Earth by struggling to blend in and form friendships while concealing their true identities.

title: Pak Pak Pakau
subTitle: Two individuals with contrasting personalities showcase their idiosyncrasies in various settings, resulting in unexpected and hilarious outcomes.

title: Motu Patlu
subTitle: Two friends from Furfuri Nagar, Motu and Patlu, constantly find themselves in absurd predicaments. Subsequently, they navigate chaos and hilarity together with the help of their quirky friends.

title: Chikoo Aur Bunty
subTitle: Two mischievous brothers lock horns in hilarious daily adventures as they compete for attention, turning ordinary family life into a battleground of clever tricks and chaos.

title: Chikoo Aur Bunty Ke Pyaar Ka Tashan
subTitle: Two brothers, Chikoo and Bunty, fight and argue occasionally, but in their hearts, they love each other. They often find themselves in and out of trouble due to their antics.

title: Bittu Bahanebaaz
subTitle: Bittu, a young mischievous boy, incessantly pesters people with his quirky and naughty behaviour. However, Bittu always manages to escape from the consequences of his actions.
